ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., championship, regatta) */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for the event */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boat class */,
  "designer" TEXT /* Designer of the boat class */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the boat class */,
  "beam" TEXT /* Beam of the boat class */,
  "draft" TEXT /* Draft of the boat class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat class the participant is competing in */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant's boat */,
  "sail_number" TEXT /* Sail number of the participant's boat */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the participant in the event */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the participant in the event */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the participant in the event */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_participant" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_classes" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat class participating in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the race session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race session */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race session */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course used in the race session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_sessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the race session */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the participant in the race session */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the participant in the race session */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the participant in the race session */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES race_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring rule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the scoring rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scoring rule */,
  "scoring_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scoring_rules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sessions" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race session */,
  "session_order" INTEGER /* Order of the session within the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_participants" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "boat_configuration" TEXT /* Description of the participant's boat configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race session */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty incurred */,
  "penalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of points deducted for the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES race_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protests" (
  "protest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protest */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant filing the protest */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race session */,
  "protest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the protest */,
  "protest_status" TEXT /* Status of the protest (e.g., pending, resolved, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protests_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES race_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protests_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
